message.thinking:

Lai veiksmīgi izpildīt uzdevumus un sasniegtu bakalaura darba mērķi, ir jāaplūko ne tikai līdzības noteikšanas jēdziens, bet arī jāpēta konceptu karšu būtība un jāatrod risinājums, kas ļautu noteikt līdzības konceptu kartēs."

We need to answer each question:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text does not list any chapters. So compliance false. Feedback: It doesn't mention any chapters or headings.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? No, no sections described. So false.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? No, structure not clear. So false.

Thus all false. Provide feedback accordingly.

Make sure JSON array with exactly 3 objects. Each object with keys: question, feedback, complies.

Let's craft.

Also ensure no extra whitespace? It's fine.
